ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., YouTube Likes, Facebook Video Views) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the service (e.g., $2.47 per 1000 likes) */,
  "min_order" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the service */,
  "max_order" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity for the service */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* The social media platform (e.g., YouTube, Facebook) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* The type of service (e.g., Likes, Subscribers, Views) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* The quality of the service (e.g., High Quality, Standard) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time for the service (e.g., 0-24H) */,
  "speed" TEXT /* The speed of the service (e.g., 30/D) */,
  "refill_policy" TEXT /* The refill policy (e.g., R30) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the seller who offers the service */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the service is currently active and available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service the tier belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of units for the tier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the tier */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price for the tier */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the tier is currently active and available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_tiers_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who placed the order */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of units ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "refunded" INTEGER /* Whether the order has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the buyer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the buyer joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the buyer's last login */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the buyer on the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the buyer has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the seller's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the seller joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the seller's last login */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the seller on the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the seller has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who left the rating */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller being rated */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "date_rated" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the rating is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)
